_meta.note: Sample output generated from the public case pack input (TKT-001 wrong transfer scenario).

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. Please help me get it back.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to an incorrect recipient via TXN-9101 at 14:08 on 14 April. Transaction history confirms a completed transfer of 5000 BDT to +8801719876543 at that time.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer. Initiate the wrong-transfer dispute process per internal SOP. Do not contact the recipient directly without authorization. Escalate to dispute resolution team for recovery attempt.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting bKash Support. We have received your complaint regarding transaction TXN-9101. Our dispute resolution team will review your case and contact you within 24–48 working hours. Please note that any eligible amount will be returned through official bKash channels if the investigation supports your claim. Do not share your PIN, OTP, or password with anyone claiming to assist you.
